2287640.name: The House In The Woods
2287640.description:
The House In The Woods is a short (30 - 60 minute) horror experience, heavily inspired by The Blair Witch Project. Originally released in 2020 as a game jam entry, this version has been expanded to include more areas to explore, as well as develop the overall story. Play in the dark with headphones for the best experience...

ENTER THE WOODS

On a camping trip into the forest, your friend has vanished in the night. As you step away from your camp to investigate you realise you are lost as well....

GAMEPLAY

  • Explore a seemingly endless forest and discover the secrets it holds...
  • A psychological horror experience that will have you looking over your shoulder
  • Crunchy lo-fi aesthetics
2287640.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
